api_key.description: Dremio Personal Access Token (PAT), sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <api_key>). Never logged.

base_url.description: Dremio REST API base URL override for Dremio Software/self-hosted, EU-region, tests, or proxies.

page_size.description: Page size (1-500) sent as the 'maxResults' query parameter on each list request.
